improvement: Deployment blocker summaries now incorporate the sanitized Cloudflare access probe automatically when cloudflare-access-probe.json exists, preventing configured-but-rejected credentials or unresolved project identity from being misreported as ready.

verification.method: isolated deterministic Node execution of byte-equivalent classification logic
covered: accepted token and resolved project remain ready
rejected token produces token_rejected and not_attempted blockers
accepted token with wrong account or missing project produces account_or_resource_not_found
resolved project without canonical hostname remains blocked
verification.source_fetch: updated summarizer fetched from main after commit

evidence_strength: source-verified and deterministic-test-verified; workflow-run and Cloudflare control-plane verification pending

privacy.policy: Only secret names, access stages, bounded reason codes, and remediation text are retained.

limits: No GitHub Actions run executed for these commits.
No Cloudflare credential or control-plane call was available in this run.
No deployment URL, served identity, or deployed commit was proven.
The canonical ACTIVE_QUEUE.json was not overwritten.
falsification_route: Run the committed workflow with shaped credentials that are rejected, unauthorized, bound to the wrong account, and fully valid; inspect cloudflare-deployment-blocker.json and require status/reason alignment without secret leakage.
